flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Wilkes Community College fell 17% between 2006 and 2009 (29.4% → 24.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wilkes Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (8.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Wilkes Community College fell 20% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.5k → $7.6k).
